rewritten_requirements: The system shall allow users to browse products through a catalog.
The system shall enable users to view items directly or explore different ways of browsing in the catalog.
The system shall allow users to browse products using an index, either alphabetically or by category.
The system shall enable users to switch between browsing options based on their preferences.
The system shall allow users to select a product once they find one of interest to view its details.
The system shall enable users to review the items in their basket at any time.
The system shall allow users from the basket to either return to the catalog or proceed to checkout.
The system shall enable users to review their selections during checkout and proceed with the purchase.
The system shall allow users to return to the catalog from the checkout page to make changes before completing the process.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Users can browse products through a catalog.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: users can browse products through a catalog.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Users can view items directly or explore different ways of browsing in the catalog.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Users can browse products using an index, either by browsing alphabetically or by category.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: users can look through products using an index, either by browsing alphabetically or by category.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Users can switch between browsing options depending on their preference.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: they can switch between these options depending on how they prefer to search.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Once a user finds an interesting product, they can select it to view its details.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: once they find something interesting, they can select a product to view its details.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Users can go to their basket at any time to review the items they have selected.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: the user can choose to go to their basket to review the items they have selected.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: From the basket, users can either return to the catalog or move forward to checkout.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: from there, they can either return to the catalog to continue browsing or move forward to checkout.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: During checkout, users review their selections and proceed with the purchase.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Users can go back to the catalog from the checkout page if they need to make changes before completing the process.
